---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for claude-eyes
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What's the specific workflow that's awkward today? Don't propose a solution yet — describe the friction.

## A proposed solution

What you imagine the fix looks like. Code shape, env var, command, whatever.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve the same problem? Why is the proposal better?

## Scope check

- [ ] This is about capturing or injecting UI context (in scope)
- [ ] This is about Claude Code integration (in scope)
- [ ] This is about the cmux bridge (in scope)
- [ ] This is about something else entirely (probably out of scope — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md))
